title: Execution Trace
description: Detailed trace of command execution with environment context

command.description: The exact command that was executed

working_directory.description: Working directory where the command was executed

exit_code.description: Exit code returned by the command

stdout.description: Standard output from the command (may be truncated)

stderr.description: Standard error output from the command (may be truncated)

started_at.description: ISO timestamp when command execution started

ended_at.description: ISO timestamp when command execution ended

process_id.description: Process ID of the executor process

node_version.description: Version of Node.js used for execution

termination_signal.description: Signal used to terminate the process, if any

timeout_occurred.description: Whether the command was terminated due to timeout
